data.title: Venmo and PayPal users can now donate to pay $36.7 trillion US debt
data.description:
The US Department of the Treasury is accepting donations from Americans who use Venmo and PayPal to reduce the $36. 7 trillion national debt. The new payment option was quietly added to the federal “Gifts to Reduce the Public Debt” program, an initiative that has existed since 1996. Users can now access Pay. gov and use the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/venmo-and-paypal-users-pay-36-7trn-us-debt/

data.title: Little-Known Stock Explodes 400% in Five Days Amid Meme Trading Mania
data.description:
Shares of a little-known healthcare stock have exploded this week as meme investment mania returns. The California-based Healthcare Triangle Inc. (HCTI) erupted 400% in just five days after the Nasdaq Hearings Panel decided to let the company remain on the Nasdaq Capital Market
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/25/little-known-stock-explodes-400-in-five-days-amid-meme-trading-mania/

data.title: New Malware Variant Taps Microsoft Technology To Steal Sensitive Bank Customer Data: Cybersecurity Researchers
data.description:
Security researchers are warning of a newly identified malware variant that makes use of Microsoft technology to steal bank customer data. The cybersecurity firm Akamai Technologies says that it has confirmed the first case of a new variant of the Coyote banking trojan maliciously using Microsoft’s UI Automation (UIA) framework “in the wild.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/25/new-malware-variant-taps-microsoft-technology-to-steal-sensitive-bank-customer-data-cybersecurity-researchers/

data.title: Revolut restores crypto services in Hungary halted due to tough regulations
data.description:
Leading European neobank Revolut has reinstated some of its cryptocurrency services in Hungary, which were suspended after Budapest introduced criminal liability for unauthorized transactions with digital assets. Hungarian users of its app can now transfer their coins to other wallets, something they were unable to do until recently. The company had decided to temporarily halt […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/revolut-restores-crypto-services-in-hungary-halted-due-to-tough-regulations/

source: https://cryptoslate.com/polymarket-puts-96-3-odds-on-no-fed-cut-next-week-despite-trumps-claim-its-ready-to-ease/

data.title: Revolut Makes Crypto Staking Available in Hungary After Restricting Services
data.description:
Revolut has recently announced the launch of its crypto staking services in Hungary, a move that comes after a period during which the company had to restrict certain financial services in the region. This development marks a significant step forward for Hungarian users, allowing them to earn rewards on their cryptocurrency holdings. The service will enable customers to stake various cryptocurrencies, providing them with an opportunity to participate in the growing digital currency ecosystem while also benefiting from potential interest earnings. The reintroduction of these services reflects Revolut's commitment to expanding its offerings and catering to the evolving needs of its customer base in Hungary.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/business/2025/07/25/revolut-makes-crypto-staking-available-in-hungary-after-restricting-services
